Title: Pickard, John
Overview: Professor of Art History, University of Missouri, Columbia; founder and first president of the College Art Association. His students included John Shapely.
Selected Bibliography: [dissertation:] Der Standort der Schauspieler und des Chors im griechischen Theater des funften Jahrhunderts. Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität, published, Munich: Ackermann, 1892.
